Actions.Effect: If the Other performs an attack this turn, at the end of its turn, return to the space it started its turn in.
If the Other performs an attack this turn, at the end of its turn, return to the space it started its turn in.
If the Other performs an attack this turn, at the end of its turn, return to the space it started its turn in.
If the Other does not have an enemy in range, Teleport to the closest empty space that is within range and line of sight of the primary target, then inflict Vulnerable [icon:vulnerable] on self.
If the Other does not have an enemy in range, Teleport to the closest empty space that is within range and line of sight of the primary target, then inflict Vulnerable [icon:vulnerable] on self.
The Other gains *Invisible* [icon:invisible] at the end of its turn.
If the Other has an enemy in range, add inflict *Frozen* [icon:frozen] to all attacks this turn. [p] Otherwise, *Leap 3*.
If the Other has an enemy in range, add inflict *Frozen* [icon:frozen] to all attacks this turn. [p] Otherwise, *Leap 3*.

End the leap adjacent to the primary target and as many enemies as possible. If it's not possible to end adjacent to the primary target, use normal adversary movement rules. Roll the *Basic* Attack die once for each enemy adjacent to the Other. For each *Critical Strike* [icon:critical-strike] rolled, inflict *Frozen* [icon:frozen] on the corresponding enemy.
